heading: Balliang East vs Balmattum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Balliang East, Victoria and Balmattum, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Balliang East has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Balmattum (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Balliang East or Balmattum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Balliang East has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Balmattum scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Balliang East scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Balmattum scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Balliang East or Balmattum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Balliang East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
